long_description:
[Acadia-SRE]-Storage pool updates are delayed [WDC] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/main/control_plane/sysdig_alerts/cluster_and_pool_alerts.md#2-storage-cluster-or-pool-updates-are-delayed
TIP Situation:                      Observed service_error-storage-pool_updates_delayed issue in Acadia-Genctl
TIP Short Description:              Storage pool updates are delayed
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:is-volume-acadia:us-east::mzone767:microservice: 

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    sum by(cluster, kube_cluster_name)(acadia_storage_pool_update{kube_cluster_name!~"dummy"}) == 0 = 0.00
Segment:
    cluster = 'cb9d7a1a-bc71-11f0-80d9-303ea725d92c' and kube_cluster_name = 'mzone767'

Time:                12/01/2025 08:55 PM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:           Prometheus
Name:           [Acadia-SRE]-Storage pool updates are delayed [WDC]
Description:    Storage pool updates are delayed
Team:           is-volume-acadia
Scope:
